node.statement: STAGE 1 (Classical): The FEM discretization of the neutron diffusion PDE (-div(D grad phi) + Sigma_a phi = (1/k) nu Sigma_f phi) on uniform mesh yields generalized eigenvalue problem (L+A)u = lambda C u, where L (diffusion/Laplacian), A (absorption/mass), C (fission/mass) are sparse NxN matrices with N=(1/h-1)^3 nodes. This is rearranged to standard form H v = k v with H = C^{1/2}(L+A)^{-1}C^{1/2}. [Paper Sections 4.1-4.3, Eqs 18-21, Problem 5]
